content: It is as impossible for man to demonstrate the existence of God as it would be for even Sherlock Holmes to demonstrate the existence of Arthur Conan Doyle.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:È impossibile per l'uomo dimostrare l'esistenza di Dio come sarebbe anche per Sherlock Holmes dimostrare l'esistenza di
